scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @mandate/web lint && uv run ruff check services/worker scripts tests packages/shared-schemas/python
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json apps/web packages/shared-schemas && uv run ruff format --check services/worker scripts tests packages/shared-schemas/python
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mandate/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @mandate/shared-schemas typecheck && uv run mypy services/worker/mandate_worker packages/shared-schemas/python/mandate_schemas scripts/generate_traceability_report.py tests
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mandate/web test && pnpm --filter @mandate/shared-schemas test && uv run pytest -q
scripts.check: pnpm schemas:check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
